textByHash.659c0bcf7cf646727964132f9420daaa4ab9f8af: I can't believe that I've been made to wait so long.
textByHash.1f57e00cbe200af1109bd7730892f9b3848b84ad: I have been waiting for an audience with the King for days!
textByHash.3a58492d6f80477196e1ef13555e96240602c893: Bah! I think he's just trying to insult the gnome nation, by making me wait. The cheek of these humans. Just because they're vertically challenged they think they can ignore us.
textByHash.adfc560bde72703dc917b346d8aa880795f39b8b: Hmm. I should be thankful for small mercies, I suppose.
textByHash.f9149d6326f8b58da805c16e08afe726406b8ee6: Many thanks. This will help wile away the time whilst I'm waiting for an audience.
textByHash.038e8450018667842ad87ca182ca85da89b907a1: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
